name: Creamy Apple Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine cake mix and butter; mix until crumbly.
3. Reserve 2/3 cup for topping; add brown sugar and cinnamon to reserved topping mixture.
4. Mix well; set aside.
5. Press remaining mixture onto bottom of ungreased 9x13" pan.
6. Arrange apple slices over base.
7. Blend sour cream and egg; spread evenly over apples.
8. Sprinkle reserved topping mixture over all.
9. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes or until topping is golden brown and bubbly.
10. Serve warm. Refrigerate leftovers. Makes 12 to 15 squares.
